morning.title: Microsoft announces Scout, an autonomous AI agent built on OpenClaw
morning.summary: Microsoft has unveiled Scout, an autonomous AI agent built on OpenClaw, which can learn from its environment and make decisions without human intervention.

morning.title: Uber caps employee AI spending after blowing through budget in four months
morning.summary: Uber has capped employee AI spending after blowing through its budget in just four months, highlighting the rapid pace of AI adoption in the company.

morning.title: IBM acquires Red Hat
morning.summary: IBM has acquired Red Hat, a leading provider of open source software solutions, to create a leading hybrid cloud provider.

morning.title: New Microsoft tool lets devs spin up AI behavior tests using text descriptions
morning.summary: Microsoft has launched a new tool that allows developers to spin up AI behavior tests using text descriptions, making it easier to test and validate AI models.

morning.title: IBM CEO says there is 'no way' spending on AI data centers will pay off
morning.summary: IBM's CEO has stated that there is no way spending on AI data centers will pay off, highlighting the challenges of investing in AI infrastructure.

gym.title: Legendary Investor Dan Loeb on AI, Credit, & Third Point’s $25B Strategy
gym.summary: Dan Loeb shares his insights on AI, credit, and Third Point's $25B strategy, providing a unique perspective on the intersection of finance and technology.

gym.title: AI makes great PMs more powerful
gym.summary: This video discusses how AI can enhance the capabilities of project managers, making them more effective and powerful in their roles.

gym.title: Dr. Deepika Chopra | The Power of Real Optimism
gym.summary: Dr. Deepika Chopra talks about the power of real optimism and how it can be applied to daily life, providing a positive and uplifting message.

gym.title: The easiest (& laziest) way to get rich
gym.summary: This video provides an unconventional perspective on getting rich, highlighting the importance of smart financial decisions and strategies.

gym.title: How to Build a Self-Improving Company with AI
gym.summary: This video explores the concept of building a self-improving company with AI, providing insights and strategies for leveraging AI to drive business growth and improvement.

gym.title: Love Thy Neighbor: Community Building with Nextdoor CEO Nirav Tolia
gym.summary: Nirav Tolia discusses the importance of community building and how Nextdoor is working to create stronger, more connected communities.
